intentSynonyms: show me my issue events in sentry
view my issue events in sentry
see all my issue events in sentry
list events for a specific issue in sentry
description: List the events (occurrences) for a specific Sentry issue. Each event represents a single occurrence of the issue with its own stack trace, tags, and context.

issue_id.description: The issue ID to list events for

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 25, max 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
